title: alsine juniperina var. glandulosa
intro: Alsine juniperina var. glandulosa, also known as glandular Alsine juniperina, is a plant species within the saxifrage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Alsine juniperina var. glandulosa include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
